text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Triple Tiara behind us, Mejiro Dober
and I have to decide on our next race...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she wants to create a new Mejiro legacy, then
there's one race that would be the perfect
send-off to her classic year!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Well, Trainer? What do you think I should run in
next?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This race will be an invaluable experience for her.
She'll be able to see firsthand what races in her
fast-approaching senior year will be like.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, compared to the races she's run so far,
it won't be easy. Not only is it a longer race, but
the competition will be on a different level.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, I want to take this huge challenge head-on
with all of our strength.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm sure she'll also be racing in the Arima Kinen too...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Air Groove, I mean.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's right. It's guaranteed that Air Groove, the
Empress, will run in the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And no doubt she'll be Mejiro Dober's greatest
threat and rival on the racetrack.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
choice_data_list: Would you rather not run the race?
Would you rather not run the race?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: No... You've got it backwards.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh, no. Sorry, I didn't get all quiet because I
don't want to run in it. It's the opposite, actually.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm just so happy. I'm finally going to race against
Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
We'll have to start preparing for the Arima Kinen
right away. I'll need to improve my stamina as well
as a few other areas I'm worried about.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Let's start training today! I'm already excited
thinking about it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober doesn't look discouraged in the
slightest! In fact, it looks like my suggestion lit a
fire under her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure she'll do great. And to prepare her for
success, we get right to training for the Arima
Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day at the Mejiro estate...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Dober, Dober! Big news!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Whoa, what's wrong, Ryan?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
It's the Arima Kinen! Have you looked at the
pre-race popularity poll results?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh right, the results came out today. But no, I
haven't looked at them yet.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: W-wait a second... Is this real?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
You came in third out of all the other prominent
racers in the lineup! That's astounding, Dober!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
This level of popularity is really something,
especially since you're still in your classic year!
Congrats, Dober!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Race with your head held high, Dober. We are all
looking forward to your grand performance.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Go out there and stir up the crowd into a real
frenzy, all right? ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Be sure to show Nakayama who you are in this
moment. If you can manage that, your tale will be
passed down through the generations.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Thank you, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I was hoping to run in the Arima Kinen with you,
Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I suppose there's always next year. I'm sure that
race will be a story for the ages!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: So for now...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Do your best and run a race you won't regret,
Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I will!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Air Groove got first in the popularity poll... No
surprise there!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(As part of my Mejiro legacy, I'm going to show
everyone a performance to remember at the
Arima Kinen!)
